passives.desc:
Gain 1 [FestivalFever] every time this unit gains positive buff with Skill effects (once per type of buff)

Turn Start: gain [FestivalFever] equal to the number of other allies (max 3)
Turn End: lose [FestivalFever] equal to the number of allies that were killed this turn

Turn End: at 8+ [FestivalFever], use a powerful Skill next turn
passives.name: Festive Sounds

passives.desc: On Hit, if the target has [Laceration], heal by 15% of damage dealt
passives.name: Bloodsucking

passives.desc: Attack End: If the target has 8+ [Laceration], gain 1 [HardenedBlood]
passives.name: Blood Coagulation

passives.desc:
Prioritizes targets with [Laceration]
Turn End: if this unit failed to deal any damage this turn, gain 2 [Vulnerable] and 2 [AttackUp] next turn
passives.name: Thirst for Blood

passives.desc:
When hit, gain +1 [Laceration] Count.
Gain 1 [HardenedBlood] and 2 [BloomingThorns] every time this unit loses 20% HP.
If there is a Bloodfiend on the field, regardless of whether it is an ally or an enemy, increase [BloodDinner] by 30 upon death
passives.name: Bloodbag

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 5 [FestivalFever] on self or every 6 [Laceration] on the target (max 2)
[WhenUse] Gain 15 [Laceration], immediately trigger it once, and reduce [Laceration] Count by 1
skills.name: Hardblood Carve

skills.name: Hardblood Wild Jag

passives.desc:
Gain 1 [FestivalFever] every time this unit gains positive buff with Skill effects (once per type of buff)

Turn Start: gain [FestivalFever] equal to the number of other allies (max 3)
Turn End: lose [FestivalFever] equal to the number of allies that were killed this turn
Turn End: heal SP equal to [FestivalFever] on self (does not activate at -45 SP)

Turn End: at 8+ [FestivalFever], use a powerful Skill next turn
passives.name: Festive Mood

passives.desc: On Hit, if the target has [Laceration], heal by 20% of damage dealt
passives.name: Bloodsucking

passives.desc: Attack End: If the target has 5+ [Laceration], gain 1 [HardenedBlood]
passives.name: Blood Coagulation

passives.desc:
- Prioritizes targets with [Laceration]
Turn End: if this unit failed to deal any damage this turn, gain 2 [Vulnerable] and 2 Offense Level Up next turn
- Turn End: if this unit dealt damage this turn, heal 5 SP
passives.name: Thirst for Blood

passives.desc:
If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase [BloodDinner] value by the amount of [Laceration] damage collectively received by every unit. 
When this unit enters the field, the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will surface.
passives.name: Bloodfeast

passives.desc: Gain [StarvingDolcineaServant] at the start of the Encounter
passives.name: Starved and Withered

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

skills.name: Welcome to the Festival of Wonders!

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Gain 1 [HardenedBlood] for every 6 [Laceration] on the target (max 2)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 5 [FestivalFever] on self or every 6 [Laceration] on the target (max 3)
[WhenUse] At less than 20 [BloodDinner], gain 20 [Laceration] and immediately trigger it once, then reduce [Laceration] Count by 1
[EndSkill] Consume 20 [BloodDinner]
skills.name: Join the Joyful Parade!

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] At 5+ [FestivalFever], Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Laceration], Clash Power +1
skills.name: Blossom your Smiles of Joy!
